package_title: I will wire an autonomous CRM/enrichment agent into your stack
description:
🔧 I will wire an autonomous CRM/enrichment agent into your stack

I deliver an agent that watches your CRM, enriches new leads, and triggers follow-up flows using n8n + Crawl4AI + maps-cli patterns + Flowise — all free/self-hosted.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no lock-in)
• Charge $1,000-$3,000 setup + $349-$999/mo retainer
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($250, 5 days, 1 rev): Single agent, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($1000, 10 days, 2 rev): Setup + test, Up to 3 agents, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($2000, 14 days, 3 rev): Full system, Unlimited agents, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me your stack/goals (form on order)
2. I build & test the autonomous agent
3. I hand over + record a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 100-skill autonomous company.

n8n_workflow.note: Tools: n8n + Crawl4AI + maps-cli patterns + Flowise — all free/self-hosted. Replace code node with your agent logic.
